---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
---

You can reach me at the following address:

**Kevin Thiry**  
Associate Professor in Cybersecurity  
French Air and Space Force Academy  
CREA - Centre de recherche de l'École de l'air et de l'espace  

Email: [kevin.thiry@ecole-air.fr](mailto:kevin.thiry@ecole-air.fr)
